chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 568 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5684/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5685/2025 (R/Surety) 16.10.2025 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Khokhar, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Pir Dino, Shahzad, Nazik and Shahbaz were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 07.07.2025, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing four original special savings certificates of such amount. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was disposed of as not pressed by this Court vide order dated 09.09.2025 on account of conclusion of their main case, wherein they have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the order dated 01.08.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
